title: uragoga lucens
intro: Uragoga lucens, a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, is commonly known as the "sour plum" or "sour plum tree." Its leaves and fruits have been used in traditional medicine, primarily for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Uragoga lucens is valued for its health benefits, such as treating fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve immune function. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing its active compounds to be extracted and utilized for medicinal purposes.
